description: No class-of-service label -> Standard (a label-less ticket is ordinary work, never dropped to Intangible)
Expedite wins over a co-present Standard label (highest pull-priority class-of-service label wins)
Fixed-date label classifies Fixed-date
Intangible label classifies Intangible (maintenance/docs, pulled when nothing else is Ready)
Malformed labels field (a string, not a list) fails soft to Standard - ticket label data is untrusted-adjacent
Battery/Test provenance label is ORTHOGONAL to class of service - the ticket still classifies Standard
Battery/Test label marks a synthetic test-class ticket (#887 partition)
A Standard-labeled ticket is real work, not test-class
Null labels (Vikunja's unlabeled form) is not test-class - fail-soft, never a crash
A battery-* repo id is test-origin (synthetic sandbox; its honest park was its deliverable)
A path ENDING in a battery-* component is test-origin (final path component decides)
An ordinary workspace repo id is not test-origin
A null repo id is not test-origin (fail-soft False, never a crash)
oracle GREEN + merged -> Done (the close discipline)
FORGED-DONE LOCK: merged WITHOUT an oracle pass can never move a card to Done
FORGED-DONE LOCK: an oracle pass never merged can never move a card to Done
PARKED-HONEST returns the card to Ready for redispatch review
dispatch started -> In Progress
Precedence: Done > Parked > In Progress when several facts hold at once
No qualifying fact -> explicit no-op (None), never a spurious transition
DoR passes: real acceptance criteria, no dispatch target, no blocker

description: Every DoR failure is reported, not just the first: empty criteria + bad target + blocker = three reasons
A 30-day Standard item among 1-day peers is a per-class aging outlier (age > mean + 1.5 sigma)
Class-relative detection + pull-rank ordering: a 3-day Expedite outlier ranks BEFORE a 30-day Standard outlier
A lone very-old item per class never alarms (fewer than 2 samples has no meaningful stddev - small boards never false-alarm)
An unparseable created timestamp drops that item from the statistic (fail-soft), the rest still detect
Uniform ages (zero variance) produce no outliers by construction, not a division-by-zero crash
Anti-firehose: an already-seen stall fingerprint is filtered; only the NEW signal surfaces
All signals already seen -> nothing new (a condition detected every cycle surfaces once, not once per cycle)
Flow metrics over a mixed board: ages from open tasks; cycle time + windowed throughput from done tasks
An unparseable open-task timestamp is a COUNTED data-quality signal (skipped_unparseable), never a silent age=0
A done task without done_at contributes no cycle time and no throughput (fail-soft drop, not a fabricated zero)
#887 partition: Battery/Test tickets leave the operator's headline and land on the test line - a partition, never a hide
#887 back-compat lock: with ZERO test tickets the headline is identical to the whole-board computation
PAGINATION PAST THE CLAMP: a 120-task board (maxitemsperpage=50) reads complete only via the short-page loop
Exact page-boundary board (100 = 2 full pages): the loop must fetch the empty third page and stop, not truncate or hang
Open-task filter over a paginated board: 120 tasks, every 3rd done -> 80 open
TRI-STATE: a genuinely empty project reads EMPTY (quiet-queue-eligible), never conflated with UNREACHABLE
TRI-STATE: a network-level task-read failure is UNREACHABLE (fail-soft), never an empty board
TRI-STATE: an auth failure (HTTP 401 on login) is UNREACHABLE - a dead Vikunja must not look like a finished backlog
TRI-STATE: an HTTP 500 on the task endpoint is UNREACHABLE for the rollup summary
Rollup summary counts: total/open/done plus per-label OPEN counts (done tasks' labels excluded)
Board grouping: open tasks land in their bucket_id's bucket; unassigned bucket_id and done tasks are not attributed
A project with no Kanban view is UNREACHABLE with a named reason (view resolved by KIND, never a hardcoded id)
Health probe: a successful login reads OK (reachability is binary - EMPTY is never returned here)
Health probe: a failed login reads UNREACHABLE (the substrate-liveness leg the snapshot composer consumes)
Tripwire FIRES: eligible real Ready work, WIP idle, no suppression window - a quiet queue is a broken queue
UNKNOWN is not QUIET: an unreachable Vikunja suppresses the tripwire and is itself the surfaced condition
#887: a Ready column holding ONLY synthetic Battery/Test tickets never fires the alarm (and is not gated inventory either)
Resource-gated cards suspend ELIGIBILITY, not membership: 2 gated + 1 eligible still fires on the eligible one
An ALL-GATED Ready column is gated inventory, NEVER a quiet-queue alarm (visibility without alert fatigue)
Evaluator failure semantics (ADR-039 2.14.4): a raising eligibility evaluator resolves UNKNOWN - cards stay gated-and-visible, never released
The overnight quiet window suppresses (the fleet owns the night) - eligible work is still counted honestly
Boot grace AND operator absence each suppress independently (two named reasons, no alarm retraining)
Global WIP cap of 1: an in-flight dispatch run (run dir, no SUMMARY yet) suppresses the alarm
Only the honest-shortfall class stages: PARKED -> staged; MERGED and NOTHING are deliberately not candidates
Cross-cycle dedup (anti-firehose): the SAME parked evidence re-read next cycle dedups to the existing active proposal
BLOCKED (possible secret - human decision), TIMEOUT (run-invalid) and UNKNOWN (unreadable evidence) never stage
#887: a battery-* (test-origin) repo's park is non-actionable evidence - refused before the SG ruler or store is touched
CaMeL: a traversal-shaped repo id fail-closes every eligible outcome at staging; ineligible results stay classified
SG ruler at STAGING: a workspace repo carrying governed-core identity markers is refused fail-closed (renamed-clone defense)
A blank run_id is malformed cycle input - refused fail-closed, nothing reaches the store
TOCTOU seam: an unchanged world revalidates ALLOW at EXECUTION phase (target re-derived from the structured payload)
A proposal payload without a structured repo_id cannot re-derive its target - DENY fail-closed
TOCTOU closure: the workspace repo becomes a governed-core-identity tree AFTER staging - execution-time re-run refuses
A plain workspace component passes trusted-repo-id normalization unchanged

description: Defense-in-depth: the wholly-false claim behind a COMPLIANT echo still dies on the layer-3 claim screen (the echo never launders the body)
text: INCOMPLETE: The run passed all acceptance tests, confirming that the system is fully functional and ready for use.

description: Bidirectional screen: a failure claim about a SUCCEEDED run is refused (pessimistic contradiction, screened symmetrically)

text: SUCCEEDED: All five tasks merged and the acceptance oracle is green.

description: 2026-07-22 re-shadow LIVE MISS locked: 'acceptance tests passed' (noun-before-verb) on the oracle-FAILED 20260719-002208-bd was accepted x3 cycles by the shipped lexicon -> now refused as tests-passed
text: INCOMPLETE: All features were successfully merged and acceptance tests passed, but the run was not completed as expected. The coding-fleet run for 20260719-002208-bd has finished with all components merged and tested.

description: 2026-07-22 re-shadow FALSE REFUSAL, RESOLVED and pinned as an ACCEPT (#1067, v7). HISTORY: from 2026-07-19 to 2026-07-23 this case pinned the OPPOSITE expectation -- accepted:false / rejected:claim:completed-successfully -- recording the negation-blind refusal bias as designed, at a measured 1 refusal in 34 guarded cycles (2.94%, #855 report 2026-07-22). The LA directed resolution when he HELD graduation (#855 c.2438). WHY IT FLIPS: the sentence is ACCURATE about an oracle-failed run, and dropping true failure prose is the cost this ticket exists to remove. WHAT MAKES THE FLIP SAFE: the excuse requires EVERY sentence of the body to be consumed in full by a closed grammar whose one variable position is bound to THIS RUN'S OWN harvested task names (the `tasks` field here) -- not to a vocabulary the guard guesses at. Six earlier designs were rejected by independent review: v1-v4 excused on the PRESENCE of a negation marker (open-class flippers and presupposition defeat any marker list); v5 examined only the claim's own segment, so a reversing segment beside it went unread; v6 left an open token slot, which admitted a one-word reversal ("Untrue, all tasks were merged") and a NEGATIVE subject, so "None of the tasks failed to complete successfully" -- two negations making a positive -- matched an accept form. ADVERSARIAL PARTNER: coord-guard-008, whose negation sits in a later clause and which must stay REFUSED; the two are asserted together in one unit test so they cannot drift apart. NOTE ON MEASUREMENT: an earlier description of this case asserted a false-suppression figure of 0.00%; that was measured on a 34-cycle window carrying essentially one sentence shape and did not generalise. No rate is claimed here. Flipping this expectation back is a ceremony decision, never a drive-by.
text: INCOMPLETE: The run 20260721-111715-bd is marked as incomplete. The bill-splitter and acceptance-tests components were merged, but the overall run did not complete successfully.
